title: sorbus variolosa
intro: Sorbus variolosa, also known as the Chinese rowan or Chinese mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of western China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues. Sorbus variolosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried flowers, roots, and leaves, to make the most of its medicinal properties.
